name: Shiny Gmail Daily Orchestrator V4.0 Lean

parameters.query: ={{"WITH expired AS (UPDATE gmail_workflow_runs SET status='timed_out', error_message='Stale run auto-cleaned by next daily run.', finished_at=NOW(), updated_at=NOW() WHERE account='" + $('Build Context And Validate Env').first().json.account.replace(/'/g,"''") + "' AND status='running' AND started_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes' RETURNING run_id), active AS (SELECT run_id, started_at FROM gmail_workflow_runs WHERE account='" + $('Build Context And Validate Env').first().json.account.replace(/'/g,"''") + "' AND status='running' AND started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1), last_done AS (SELECT finished_at, completed_count FROM gmail_workflow_runs WHERE account='" + $('Build Context And Validate Env').first().json.account.replace(/'/g,"''") + "' AND status LIKE 'completed%' AND finished_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM active) AS active_run, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM expired) AS expired_count, (SELECT run_id FROM active) AS active_run_id, (SELECT finished_at FROM last_done) AS last_completed_at, (SELECT completed_count FROM last_done) AS last_completed_count;"}}

parameters.jsCode: const c=$('Build Context And Validate Env').first().json;const row=$input.first()?.json||{};const dbError=!!row.error;return [{json:{...c,activeRun:dbError?true:Boolean(row.active_run),activeRunId:row.active_run_id||null,expiredStaleRuns:Number(row.expired_count||0),lastCompletedAt:row.last_completed_at||null,lastCompletedCount:row.last_completed_count??null,guardDbError:dbError,guardErrorMessage:row.error?.message||null}}];

parameters.query: ={{"INSERT INTO gmail_workflow_runs (run_id, account, status, started_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('" + $json.runId.replace(/'/g,"''") + "','" + $json.account.replace(/'/g,"''") + "','running', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING run_id, account, status, started_at;"}}

={{ "SELECT sender_pattern, match_type, rule_type, priority, enabled, created_at FROM gmail_sender_rules WHERE account='" + $('Build Context And Validate Env').first().json.account.replace(/'/g, "''") + "' AND enabled = true ORDER BY priority ASC, CASE WHEN match_type='exact' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, created_at DESC;" }}

parameters.jsCode: const input=$input.first()?.json||{};const parent=(()=>{try{return $('Split Emails').first().json}catch{return {}}})();function isAiSource(s){return ['ai','ai_low_confidence','ai_failed'].includes(String(s||''));}function waitMultiplierFrom(obj){const err=String(obj.errorMessage||obj.error?.message||'').toLowerCase();return(err.includes('429')||err.includes('503')||err.includes('unavailable')||err.includes('resource_exhausted')||err.includes('rate'))?3:1;}if(input.error)return[{json:{status:'failed',messageId:parent.messageId||input.messageId||null,sender:parent.sender||null,subject:parent.subject||null,category:'needs-review',source:'child_execution_failed',confidence:0,reasoning:'Child workflow execution failed.',errorMessage:String(input.error.message||input.error||'Unknown child error').slice(0,500),failureStage:'child_execution_failed',totalDiscovered:parent.totalDiscovered||0,batchSaturated:!!parent.batchSaturated,ruleWarning:parent.ruleWarning||null,usedGeminiBudget:Boolean(parent.needsGemini),dynamicWaitMultiplier:waitMultiplierFrom(input)}}];const usedGeminiBudget=Boolean(parent.needsGemini||isAiSource(input.source));return[{json:{...input,totalDiscovered:parent.totalDiscovered||input.totalDiscovered||0,batchSaturated:!!(parent.batchSaturated||input.batchSaturated),ruleWarning:parent.ruleWarning||input.ruleWarning||null,usedGeminiBudget,dynamicWaitMultiplier:waitMultiplierFrom(input)}}];

parameters.query: ={{"UPDATE gmail_workflow_runs SET status='"+String($json.status||'completed').replace(/'/g,"''")+"', total_discovered="+Number($json.totalDiscovered||0)+", completed_count="+Number($json.completed||0)+", failed_count="+Number($json.failed||0)+", review_count="+Number($json.needsReview||0)+", error_message="+($json.errorMessage?"'"+String($json.errorMessage).slice(0,500).replace(/'/g,"''")+"'":"NULL")+", finished_at=NOW(), updated_at=NOW() WHERE run_id='"+String($json.runId).replace(/'/g,"''")+"' RETURNING status, finished_at;"}}
